title: Lennar Elects Serena Wolfe to the Board of Directors
text: MIAMI , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennar Corporation (NYSE: LEN and LEN.B), one of the nation's leading homebuilders, announced today that Lennar's Board of Directors has elected Serena Wolfe to serve as a member of the Board of Directors, effective September 2, 2023, for a term extending until Lennar's 2024 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Ms. Wolfe has served as Chief Financial Officer of Annaly Capital Management, a leading diversified capital manager with investment strategies across mortgage finance since December 2019.
